activities.name: LookupTableList
activities.description: Retrieve the table list from my database

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE  TABLE_SCHEMA = 'dbo' and TABLE_NAME not in ( 'TGT_NASDAQ_LISTED_DS')
select MAX(LastModifytime) as NewWatermarkvalue from data_source_table
